value.fullName: Facing many competitors offering similar or better deals
value.label: Facing many competitors offering similar or better deals

value.fullName: Other offers could better meet customer requirements
value.label: Other offers could better meet customer requirements

value.fullName: Offer is superior to others but still faces competition
value.label: Offer is superior to others but still faces competition

value.fullName: Offer is very compellive compared to alternative available to customer
value.label: Offer is very compellive compared to alternative available to customer
